name: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: Teresa Checks In
original_name: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: Teresa Checks In
overview: In the Real Housewives of New Jersey Teresa Checks In, viewers will see how Joe is adjusting to raising the girls without their mother. As expected, there are challenges along the way, but with daily phone calls and frequent trips to see Teresa, the family does their best to come together to get through this difficult time.
